name: The MBD Project
description:
I HATE THE XENETICS BEING SO FUCKING COLORFUL!!! HOW AM I SUPPOSED TO DESCRIBE A TELREC??😭

GRAHHHHHH HANGOUT GAME WITH SENTIENT ANIMAL PEOPLE CALLED XENETICS🗣🗣🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥

The game is still in EARLY development as of now, and information about the Xenetics can be subject to change. Although I'm guessing they will not be.

By the way you NEED to know the Xenetics at least, because you create your own scenario.

Current Xenetics: Duro, Bishop, Hydroaxial, Anthosa, Xerox, Orca, Kroyena, Blunder Orca, Mellivox

Special Characters(the NPCS): Henry(Xenetic), Solar, Scarce, Byt, Billy, Navi,
creator: UnbalancedDragonfruit49
